style_effects: Glowing crimson energy auras pulse rhythmically around Venusaur's limbs, casting long, slow-motion trails of crystalline frost patterns that refract light into prismatic shards. A deep indigo aura encircles its body in a swirling, geometric halo, radiating cold blue-white light that illuminates the surrounding air with shimmering metallic reflections on its armored scales. The atmosphere is charged with a serene yet powerful icy luminescence, evoking the stillness of a frozen mountain peak under a moonlit sky. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
